description_long: This house features a modern design with a prominent gable roof covered in red tiles and a large glass facade framed in wood, allowing for ample natural light. The front elevation is dominated by floor-to-ceiling windows, while the side and rear walls are constructed from light brown brick, providing a solid and private enclosure. A smaller, shed-style roof extends from one side, creating a covered area or possible carport. The roof includes a skylight, adding to the contemporary feel and enhancing interior illumination. The rear of the house has a sliding glass door, offering access to the backyard or patio area. The structure sits on a paved base, suggesting integration with an urban or suburban environment.
description: A modern house with a red gable roof, large front glass windows, brick walls, and a skylight, set on a paved base.
description_view_0: Front view shows the expansive glass facade framed in wood beneath the red gable roof, with a skylight visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the brick wall, the shed roof extension, and the alignment of tall windows along the side.
description_view_2: Rear view displays a solid brick wall with a sliding glass door and minimal window openings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view reveals the shed roof extension, brick wall, and the continuation of the glass window arrangement.
attribute_window_arrangement: large picture windows on front, vertical strips on side, minimal rear openings
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway is a large glass door integrated into the front window wall, with no visible steps or porch, emphasizing a seamless modern aesthetic.
